summary: Comprehensive SKILLMATE AI testing completed - Backend 100% functional, Frontend integration fully working

resolved_issues.issue: All AI generation endpoints returning 520 errors
resolved_issues.root_cause: Deprecated Google Generative AI package and model names

resolved_issues.issue: Emergent mode using unavailable gemini-2.5-pro model on free tier
resolved_issues.root_cause: Free tier API key doesn't have access to premium models
resolved_issues.fix_applied: Modified emergent mode to use same model with optimized parameters (lower temperature, reduced tokens)

minor_issues.issue: Redirects to auth when accessed in new browser session
minor_issues.fix_priority: NOT A BUG - Working as intended
